description: Snow simulation.

description: 'The Matrix' Digital Rain Simulation.

description: Demonstrates sprite sheet animation.

description: Sprite sheet torture test.

name: Five Pointed Star
description: Generates a five pointed start polygon.

description: Lava lamp simulation with morphing blobs.

description: Northern Lights with undulating ribbon polylines over a starfield.

description: Symmetrical mandala with rotating, color-cycling ellipses.

description: Top-down solar system with orbiting planets and glowing sun.

description: Translucent jellyfish pulsing and drifting through a dark ocean.

description: Fireworks bursting over a city skyline with fading spark trails.

description: Expanding concentric ripple rings on a dark water surface.

description: Shape morphing between regular polygons with gradient fills.

name: DNA Helix
description: Rotating 3D double helix with color-coded base pairs.

description: Functional analog clock with aurora background and color-shifting hands.

name: Stargate Tunnel
description: Warp tunnel with zooming octagonal rings and streaking stars.

name: Ocean Waves
description: Layered ocean waves with sunset sky and foam highlights.

description: Three spirograph patterns drawn progressively with glowing pens.

name: Fireflies
description: Glowing fireflies drifting through a moonlit forest clearing.

description: Rotating spiral galaxy with twinkling stars and glowing core.

name: Plasma Effect
description: Classic demoscene plasma with sine-based color cycling.

description: Newton's Cradle desk toy with metallic gradient balls.

description: ECG heartbeat monitor with scanning green trace and BPM readout.

description: Radar screen simulation with rotating sweep and dense moving traffic returns.
